biological_replicate: the 3′-end of the endogenous gene in a heterozygote cell line (TbSTT3A/B/C+/−) was tagged
technical_replicate: the proportion of the reporter glycoprotein processed by TbSTT3A (and therefore resistant to Endo H) was measured
experimental_design: Taken together, these data suggest that TbSTT3A and TbSTT3B form hetero-oligomeric complexes
factor_value: TbSTT3A is responsible for co-translational transfer of biantennary Man5GlcNAc2 predominantly to N-glycosylation sequons
